\textbf{Alex Rivera} \\
Frontend Software Engineer

\section*{Summary}
Frontend engineer with 5+ years building accessible, responsive single-page
applications. Deep expertise in React, TypeScript, and modern CSS.

\section*{Skills}
React, Redux, TypeScript, JavaScript (ES2022), HTML5, CSS3, Sass, Tailwind CSS,
Next.js, Webpack, Vite, Jest, React Testing Library, Storybook, Figma, WCAG
accessibility, responsive design, GraphQL (Apollo Client).

\section*{Experience}
\textbf{Senior Frontend Engineer}, ShopFast --- 2021--present
\begin{itemize}
  \item Built the React/Redux checkout SPA serving 2M monthly users.
  \item Cut bundle size 40\% via Vite code-splitting and lazy routes.
  \item Led the design-system migration to Tailwind and Storybook.
\end{itemize}

\section*{Education}
B.S. Computer Science, UC Irvine.
